markdownRemark.excerpt: As salāmu ʿalaikum This is to inform you that Wednesday classes with Abū ʿAbd al-Raḥmān will be cancelled from now on, until further notice. Friday and Saturday…
markdownRemark.html:
As salāmu ʿalaikum

This is to inform you that Wednesday classes with Abū ʿAbd al-Raḥmān will be cancelled from now on, until further notice.

Friday and Saturday classes will continue as is, unless otherwise informed.

Please pass on this message.

Jazākam Allāhu khair.

frontmatter.title: No Q&A Telelink To The Scholars Tomorrow
